name: Integration Smart Scheduling
description: Tests full ecosystem scheduling via real CLI commands: capturing ASYNC tickets, submitting permits interactively via CLI, resolving via CLI, and claiming explicitly.

steps.comment: 2. Agent B requests async ticket via CLI.
3. Agent C requests interactive permit (Using API wrapper for speed instead of blocked CLI subprocess).
4. Agent A attempts workflow, receives stderr warning from shim that an interactive permit is pending.
5. Agent A grants the permit interactively via CLI.
Allow watchdog to process promotion of Agent B's ticket.
7. Agent B explicitly claims its ticket via CLI.
